_comment: Westbrook University — campus contacts for Compass /myteam feature. This is fictional demo data.

contacts.name: Office of Academic Advising
contacts.title: Director of Academic Advising
contacts.walk_in: Tues & Thurs: 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM (no appointment needed)
contacts.notes: All undergraduate students are assigned an advisor. Check your student portal for your assigned advisor's name and direct email.

contacts.name: Westbrook Tutoring & Learning Center
contacts.title: Tutoring Center Coordinator
contacts.office_hours: Mon–Thurs: 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM | Fri: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM | Sun: 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM
contacts.walk_in: Drop-in hours available Mon–Fri: 12:00 PM – 3:00 PM
contacts.notes: Peer tutoring is free for all enrolled students. Bring your course syllabus and specific questions to get the most out of your session.

contacts.name: Office of Financial Aid & Scholarships
contacts.title: Senior Financial Aid Counselor
contacts.walk_in: First-come, first-served: Mon, Wed, Fri: 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM
contacts.notes: For questions about your aid package, missing documents, or disbursement timing. Have your student ID ready when you call or visit.

contacts.name: Westbrook Student Wellness Center
contacts.title: Director of Counseling Services
contacts.walk_in: Same-day urgent appointments available — call ahead
contacts.notes: Confidential counseling services are free for all enrolled students. For after-hours mental health support, call the crisis line or text HOME to 741741 (Crisis Text Line).

contacts.name: Westbrook Career Services
contacts.title: Assistant Director, Student Career Development
contacts.notes: Use Handshake (linked from the student portal) to find internships and jobs posted directly to Westbrook students.

contacts.name: Linden Memorial Library
contacts.office_hours: Mon–Thurs: 7:30 AM – 11:00 PM | Fri: 7:30 AM – 8:00 PM | Sat: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM | Sun: 12:00 PM – 11:00 PM
contacts.research_help_chat: Available during library hours at westbrook.edu/library
contacts.notes: Librarians can help you find sources, cite correctly, and navigate academic databases. Chat support is available online without an appointment.

contacts.name: Office of the Registrar
contacts.notes: For official transcripts, allow 3–5 business days for processing. Unofficial transcripts are available instantly through the student portal.

contacts.name: Office of the Dean of Students
contacts.title: Dean of Students
contacts.notes: Contact the Dean of Students office for issues related to student conduct, academic integrity, medical withdrawals, and situations affecting your academic progress.

contacts.name: Office of Disability & Accessibility Services
contacts.title: Accessibility Specialist
contacts.notes: Contact this office as early as possible each semester to set up academic accommodations. Documentation from a licensed provider is required for most accommodations.

contacts.name: Westbrook IT Services
contacts.office_hours: Mon–Fri: 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM | Sat: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM
contacts.notes: For after-hours issues, submit a ticket at it.westbrook.edu/support and it will be handled the next business day.
